/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/AsteroidsGL.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/AsteroidsGL.dir/src/mainAsteroids.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AsteroidsGL.dir/src/Asteroid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AsteroidsGL.dir/src/Bullet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AsteroidsGL.dir/src/Flame.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AsteroidsGL.dir/src/ObjectsList.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AsteroidsGL.dir/src/Shape.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AsteroidsGL.dir/src/Ship.cpp.o -o AsteroidsGL  /usr/lib/libglut.so /usr/lib/libGLU.so /usr/lib/libXmu.so /usr/lib/libXi.so /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so
